name: atl
description: Thin Atlassian CLI for the ai-sdlc skill library — Jira REST v3, Agile, Confluence v2. JSON-only output.

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/atl.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
